changelog.title: Content Buckets — track what's working
changelog.desc: Tag any content card with a topic or offer (like '1:1 Coaching' or 'Freebie') and see a live breakdown in your Content Planner. At a glance you can tell which formats you're using most for each topic. Add your own buckets, tag as you go, and let the pattern show up on its own.

changelog.title: What worked? note on every card
changelog.desc: There's now an optional note field at the bottom of every content card. No pressure to fill it in — but if something performs well, it's a handy place to jot it before you forget.

changelog.title: Content Planner has a new look
changelog.desc: The Planner now has the Content by Bucket strip above your kanban so you can see your content patterns without leaving the view. Collapse it when you don't need it, expand it when you do.

changelog.title: A few things that needed sorting
changelog.desc: The update popup now works properly for every account. The Learn More button on the login page now goes to the right place. Some mobile scroll fixes in the Planner so the view doesn't get cut off.
